text.title: Continuous Discovery Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the Continuous Discovery methodology. Every rule pairs a binary check with sourced rationale, plus the universal skip-this-methodology gate.

rule.statement: Implement all 6 cadence levels (daily signal/ticket, weekly interview + competitor + assumption, bi-weekly OST, monthly review) or the practice degrades into a research graveyard.
rule.rationale: Assumption testing is the first step teams skip; without a scheduled slot it disappears in 4 weeks.

rule.statement: Haiku for daily mechanical collection; Sonnet for weekly synthesis; Opus only for bi-weekly+ pattern recognition.
rule.rationale: Opus on daily triage burns tokens for no marginal value; the cadence must match reasoning depth.

rule.statement: Ban the word 'validated' in agent prompts and outputs; use 'assumption tested' or 'evidence found' instead.
rule.rationale: Torres explicitly rejects validation theater; the word ban forces the right framing.

rule.statement: Require N>=5 observations across at least 2 independent sources before any 'finding' is published; reject completions that violate this.
rule.rationale: LLMs declare insights from thin signal; one Slack thread is not a pattern.

rule.statement: Force opportunity-vs-solution classification at intake; reject feature-shaped requests ('add filter X') and re-prompt for the underlying need.
rule.rationale: Teams revert to solution mode under pressure; the rejection rule maintains discipline.

rule.statement: Score opportunities on frequency x severity x addressability; emit numeric scores with week-over-week deltas.
rule.rationale: Gut-feel prioritization is unauditable; deltas reveal urgency shifts.

rule.statement: Lint every agent output for terms not present in the last 20 interview transcripts.
rule.rationale: Internal jargon in opportunities signals reasoning from product assumptions, not user mental models.

rule.statement: Every monthly research-review pass MUST produce a kill list (parked/dead opportunities); without pruning OSTs collapse under their own weight.
rule.rationale: Opportunities accumulate faster than they resolve; pruning keeps the tree iterable.

rule.statement: Apply this methodology only if all entries in `## Applies If` hold and none of `## Skip If` triggers; otherwise abort and route to the correct methodology.

rationale.source: F-066 spec — decision tree minimum form

rule.rationale: A misrouted methodology produces wrong-shape output; the explicit skip rule is the universal default branch from the decision tree.
